gradings: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: صحيح - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (11/8)
Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: صحيح - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (11/8)
text: إِنَّ رَجُلًا مِنْ بَنِي تَمِيمٍ أَتَى النَّبِيَّ ( صلى الله عليه وآله ) فَقَالَ أَوْصِنِي فَكَانَ فِيمَا أَوْصَاهُ أَنْ قَالَ لَا تَسُبُّوا النَّاسَ فَتَكْتَسِبُوا الْعَدَاوَةَ بَيْنَهُمْ .

en.hubeali: From him, from Al Hassan Bin Mahboub, from Hisham Bin Salim, from Abu Baseer,

(It has been narrated) from Abu Ja’far<sup>asws</sup> having said: ‘A man from the Clan of Tameym came over to the Prophet<sup>saww</sup>, and he said, ‘Advise me’. So, among what he<sup>saww</sup> advised him with was that he<sup>saww</sup> said: ‘Do not insult the people for it would earn you the enmity between them’.
en.sarwar: 3. It is narrated from him (narrator of the Hadith above) from al-Hassan ibn Mahbub from Hisham ibn Salim from abu Basir from abu Ja’far (a.s.) who has said the following: “Once a man from the people of Tamim came to the Holy Prophet and said, ‘Instruct me with good advice.’ Of the good advice given to him was: ‘Do not revile people; it only earns their animosity against you.’”
